summary: Build a landing page hero section with a generated realistic futuristic dark full-screen background, maintaining a glassmorphism style with clear readable text.
architectural_notes: Hero: use full-screen generated futuristic dark background image; place key text inside a glassmorphism card/overlay to preserve readability.
imageRequirements:
## Required Images
- Realistic futuristic dark full-screen background image with advanced sci-fi architectural/technological detail, cinematic lighting, and subtle depth (hero-futuristic-dark-bg.dim_1920x1080.png)

existing_features.title: Generate a realistic, advanced-looking, futuristic dark full-screen hero background image and add it as a static asset under frontend/public/assets/generated.

Update the hero section to use the new generated futuristic dark background image as the base layer, while preserving the existing glassmorphism hero panel and ensuring the hero headline/subtext remain clearly readable on all viewport sizes.
Centralize the new hero background image reference in the shared frontend/src/config/assets.ts file and use that constant from the hero section implementation.

new_feature_requests.summary: Add generated realistic futuristic dark full-screen hero background while maintaining glassmorphism; ensure text remains clear (text inside glassy card/overlay).

projectName: Add realistic futuristic dark hero background image while preserving glassmorphism and text clarity
